name: EventUtils
javadoc:
/**
 * Provides some useful event-based utility methods.
 *
 * @since 3.0
 */

members.name: EventUtils
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Make private in 4.0.
 *
 * @deprecated TODO Make private in 4.0.
 */

members.name: addEventListener
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Adds an event listener to the specified source.  This looks for an "add" method corresponding to the event
 * type (addActionListener, for example).
 *
 * @param eventSource   the event source.
 * @param listenerType  the event listener type.
 * @param listener      the listener.
 * @param <L>           the event listener type.
 * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the object doesn't support the listener type.
 */

tags.name: IllegalArgumentException
tags.content: if the object doesn't support the listener type.
tags.description: if the object doesn't support the listener type.

members.name: bindEventsToMethod
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Binds an event listener to a specific method on a specific object.
 *
 * @param <L>          the event listener type.
 * @param target       the target object.
 * @param methodName   the name of the method to be called.
 * @param eventSource  the object which is generating events (JButton, JList, etc.).
 * @param listenerType the listener interface (ActionListener.class, SelectionListener.class, etc.).
 * @param eventTypes   the event types (method names) from the listener interface (if none specified, all will be
 *                     supported).
 */

tags.name: methodName
tags.content: the name of the method to be called.
tags.description: the name of the method to be called.

tags.name: eventSource
tags.content: the object which is generating events (JButton, JList, etc.).
tags.description: the object which is generating events (JButton, JList, etc.).

tags.name: eventTypes
tags.content: the event types (method names) from the listener interface (if none specified, all will be supported).
tags.description: the event types (method names) from the listener interface (if none specified, all will be supported).

name: EventBindingInvocationHandler

members.name: EventBindingInvocationHandler
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Creates a new instance of {@link EventBindingInvocationHandler}.
 *
 * @param target the target object for method invocations.
 * @param methodName the name of the method to be invoked.
 * @param eventTypes the names of the supported event types.
 */

tags.name: target
tags.content: the target object for method invocations.

tags.name: methodName
tags.content: the name of the method to be invoked.

tags.name: eventTypes
tags.content: the names of the supported event types.

members.name: invoke
members.javadoc:
/**
 * Handles a method invocation on the proxy object.
 *
 * @param proxy the proxy instance.
 * @param method the method to be invoked.
 * @param parameters the parameters for the method invocation.
 * @return the result of the method call.
 * @throws SecurityException if an underlying accessible object's method denies the request.
 * @see SecurityManager#checkPermission
 * @throws Throwable if an error occurs
 */

tags.name: parameters
tags.content: the parameters for the method invocation.

tags.name: SecurityException
tags.content: if an underlying accessible object's method denies the request.
